entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: The Consultative Group on International Agricultural Research, an organization managing crop improvement programs.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving crop varieties to meet multiple objectives for farmers and the community.

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs focusing on improving dietary quality.

entities.name: HEALTH
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs focusing on human health.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs ensuring access to sufficient and nutritious food.

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs aimed at decreasing poverty.

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs to improve the means of securing the necessities of life.

entities.name: JOBS
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs to create employment opportunities.

entities.name: GENDER EQUALITY
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs promoting equal rights and opportunities.

entities.name: YOUTH
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs focusing on the inclusion and empowerment of young people.

entities.name: INCLUSION
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs ensuring marginalized groups are included.

entities.name: CLIMATE ADAPTATION
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs to adjust to the effects of climate change.

entities.name: CLIMATE MITIGATION
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs to reduce the emission of greenhouse gases.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs to maintain a healthy environment.

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: A goal of CGIAR crop improvement programs to preserve biological diversity.

entities.name: CROP CHOICE
entities.description: The initial step in the crop improvement process where the target crop is selected.

entities.name: BREEDING OBJECTIVES
entities.description: The step in the crop improvement process where specific goals for the new variety are defined.

entities.name: PRODUCTION OF NEW VARIETIES
entities.description: The process of creating potential new crop varieties.

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of choosing the best varieties from the produced potential new varieties.

entities.name: ADOPTION BY FARMERS
entities.description: The final stage of the crop improvement process where farmers begin using the new varieties.

entities.name: MULTIDISCIPLINARY TEAMS
entities.description: Teams consisting of various disciplines working together, identified as a key factor for success in crop improvement.
